title: Mastering CSS Grid for Complex Layouts

questions.sentence: CSS Grid is a powerful two-dimensional layout system that allows developers to create complex web designs with ease.
Unlike Flexbox, which is primarily one-dimensional (row or column), Grid handles both rows and columns at the same time.
One of the unique features of Grid is the 'fr' unit, which represents a fraction of the available space.
Phrases like 'grid-area' allow you to name specific parts of your layout and position elements based on those names.
By combining Grid for overall page structure and Flexbox for individual component alignment, you can achieve a sophisticated and responsive user interface with minimal code.
